title: anthemis tenuiloba f. pentelica
intro: Anthemis tenuiloba f. pentelica, also known as Pentelicum chamomile or Yarrow, is a subspecies of Anthemis tenuiloba, a flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of volatile oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Anthemis tenuiloba f. pentelica include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
